betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Starmetal§f is a rare celestial metal with unique properties.

§eObtaining:§f
• Meteor mining (rare drops)
• Certain advanced processes

§eUses:§f
• §bStarmetal Pickaxe§f - mining tool for special ores
• Components for §bMolten§f and §bBismuth Pickaxes§f
• §aBoth upgrades are unbreakable§f with special abilities

§eSpecial Ability:§f
Starmetal-based pickaxes can mine §bDepth Rock§f.

§aTip:§f Save for pickaxe crafting if mining bedrock-level materials.
